## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss potential Chief of Staff role at Marcel's rapidly growing AI-enabled services company](https://fathom.video/share/9ycD2j4ihsNLxsDjbDTjykN1bBf9UWmL?tab=summary&timestamp=5.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Marcel's company provides AI-enabled marketing services, growing rapidly with 25+ clients and $39k/mo deals](https://fathom.video/share/9ycD2j4ihsNLxsDjbDTjykN1bBf9UWmL?tab=summary&timestamp=88.0)
  - [Bridget has extensive experience as Chief of Staff at Airbyte, handling investor relations, biz ops, and special projects](https://fathom.video/share/9ycD2j4ihsNLxsDjbDTjykN1bBf9UWmL?tab=summary&timestamp=125.0)
  - [Role would involve operationalizing Marcel's vision, building scalable processes, and managing rapid growth](https://fathom.video/share/9ycD2j4ihsNLxsDjbDTjykN1bBf9UWmL?tab=summary&timestamp=730.0)
  - [Timing may be challenging with Bridget's upcoming 3-week honeymoon, but both are open to finding a solution](https://fathom.video/share/9ycD2j4ihsNLxsDjbDTjykN1bBf9UWmL?tab=summary&timestamp=2900.0)

## Topics

### Company Overview

  - [Provides AI-enabled marketing services (content creation, distribution, conversion)](https://fathom.video/share/9ycD2j4ihsNLxsDjbDTjykN1bBf9UWmL?tab=summary&timestamp=494.0)
  - [25+ clients, including seed-stage startups to public companies like Reddit](https://fathom.video/share/9ycD2j4ihsNLxsDjbDTjykN1bBf9UWmL?tab=summary&timestamp=571.0)
  - [Recent $39k/month deal closed in just two weeks](https://fathom.video/share/9ycD2j4ihsNLxsDjbDTjykN1bBf9UWmL?tab=summary&timestamp=479.0)
  - [Extremely high growth - pipeline to potentially double in size soon](https://fathom.video/share/9ycD2j4ihsNLxsDjbDTjykN1bBf9UWmL?tab=summary&timestamp=1653.0)
  - [Transitioning to pod structure with pod leads and account managers](https://fathom.video/share/9ycD2j4ihsNLxsDjbDTjykN1bBf9UWmL?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Building proprietary AI tools/workflows that could become standalone products](https://fathom.video/share/9ycD2j4ihsNLxsDjbDTjykN1bBf9UWmL?tab=summary&timestamp=2121.0)

### Chief of Staff Role

  - [Help operationalize Marcel's vision and ideas](https://fathom.video/share/9ycD2j4ihsNLxsDjbDTjykN1bBf9UWmL?tab=summary&timestamp=730.0)
  - [Build scalable processes and structures as company rapidly grows](https://fathom.video/share/9ycD2j4ihsNLxsDjbDTjykN1bBf9UWmL?tab=summary&timestamp=1394.0)
  - [Assist with fundraising, c-corp conversion, equity allocation in January](https://fathom.video/share/9ycD2j4ihsNLxsDjbDTjykN1bBf9UWmL?tab=summary&timestamp=2661.0)
  - [Manage cross-functional projects and coordination](https://fathom.video/share/9ycD2j4ihsNLxsDjbDTjykN1bBf9UWmL?tab=summary&timestamp=1793.0)
  - [Potential focus areas: account delivery, client success, staffing/hiring](https://fathom.video/share/9ycD2j4ihsNLxsDjbDTjykN1bBf9UWmL?tab=summary&timestamp=1793.0)

### Bridget's Background

  - [3 years as Chief of Staff at Airbyte](https://fathom.video/share/9ycD2j4ihsNLxsDjbDTjykN1bBf9UWmL?tab=summary&timestamp=241.0)
  - [Handled investor relations, board meetings, exec recruiting](https://fathom.video/share/9ycD2j4ihsNLxsDjbDTjykN1bBf9UWmL?tab=summary&timestamp=754.0)
  - [Ran biz ops, analytics, go-to-market metrics](https://fathom.video/share/9ycD2j4ihsNLxsDjbDTjykN1bBf9UWmL?tab=summary&timestamp=818.0)
  - [Led various special projects (BDR team, offshore engineering strategy, etc.)](https://fathom.video/share/9ycD2j4ihsNLxsDjbDTjykN1bBf9UWmL?tab=summary&timestamp=856.0)
  - [MBA from Stanford GSB](https://fathom.video/share/9ycD2j4ihsNLxsDjbDTjykN1bBf9UWmL?tab=summary&timestamp=125.0)

### Hiring Process & Timeline

  - [Marcel aiming to have offer signed before holidays, start in January](https://fathom.video/share/9ycD2j4ihsNLxsDjbDTjykN1bBf9UWmL?tab=summary&timestamp=2412.0)
  - [Bridget potentially available end of January after Airbyte transition](https://fathom.video/share/9ycD2j4ihsNLxsDjbDTjykN1bBf9UWmL?tab=summary&timestamp=2483.0)
  - [Next steps: Bridget to complete application and video interview this weekend](https://fathom.video/share/9ycD2j4ihsNLxsDjbDTjykN1bBf9UWmL?tab=summary&timestamp=2744.0)
  - [Marcel to fast-track through process given initial conversation](https://fathom.video/share/9ycD2j4ihsNLxsDjbDTjykN1bBf9UWmL?tab=summary&timestamp=2551.0)
  - [Potential live case study/problem-solving session on Tuesday before Bridget's trip](https://fathom.video/share/9ycD2j4ihsNLxsDjbDTjykN1bBf9UWmL?tab=summary&timestamp=2900.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Bridget to complete online application and notify Marcel](https://fathom.video/share/9ycD2j4ihsNLxsDjbDTjykN1bBf9UWmL?tab=summary&timestamp=2744.0)
  - [Marcel to move Bridget to video interview stage ASAP](https://fathom.video/share/9ycD2j4ihsNLxsDjbDTjykN1bBf9UWmL?tab=summary&timestamp=2746.0)
  - [Explore possibility of live case study session on Tuesday afternoon](https://fathom.video/share/9ycD2j4ihsNLxsDjbDTjykN1bBf9UWmL?tab=summary&timestamp=2900.0)
  - [Marcel to consider how to handle final interview stages given Bridget's upcoming 3-week trip](https://fathom.video/share/9ycD2j4ihsNLxsDjbDTjykN1bBf9UWmL?tab=summary&timestamp=2880.0)
  - [Regroup on Monday to align on next steps and timeline](https://fathom.video/share/9ycD2j4ihsNLxsDjbDTjykN1bBf9UWmL?tab=summary&timestamp=3021.0)
